deeperExplanation: In production systems, Dependency Injection enables modular software architectures, clear scope separation, and efficient resource allocation.
internalImplementation: The Java execution engine compiles and optimizes Dependency Injection by managing evaluation frames and symbol resolution on the call stack.

examples.title: Intermediate Dependency Injection Pattern
examples.explanation: Applied engineering pattern showing Dependency Injection in a structured context.

performanceConsiderations.timeComplexity: O(1) to O(N) depending on operation type

debuggingWalkthrough.bugDescription: Common scoping or boundary error in Dependency Injection.
debuggingWalkthrough.diagnosis: Inspect variable declarations, types, and scope limits.
debuggingWalkthrough.explanation: Ensure proper initialization and type assertions.

bestPractices: Keep functions and modules focused on a single responsibility
Write clear documentation and unit tests for every core feature
